final:
module RefModule(
    input [7:0] data_in_0,
    input [7:0] data_in_1,
    input [7:0] data_in_2,
    input [7:0] data_in_3,
    input sel1,
    input sel2,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);always @(*) begin
    case ({sel1, sel2})
        2'b00: data_out = data_in_0;
        2'b01: data_out = data_in_1;
        2'b10: data_out = data_in_2;
        2'b11: data_out = data_in_3;
    endcase
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
